raw_consumer_statement: I opened a gm rewards card with barclay it has been restricted since XX/XX/XXXX the day after I received it! I have 5 charges on there to XXXX XXXXXXXX XXXX XXXX! That i didnt get the services for i have tried to dispute those charges and charge them back! I couldnt do it on the phone or online because of the restrictions! So i mailed in the dispute and my documents to charge back the XXXX dollar charges and they will not dispute those charges and i now have a blocked card and an out standing bill! The costumer service has been a disaster! I made a open dispute at XXXX XXXX to XXXX today on XX/XX/XXXX
